proposed_label: Ci si: impersonal of a reflexive verb
proposed_description: The impersonal of a reflexive or pronominal verb, where impersonal si and reflexive si combine and the first surfaces as ci: ci si riposa, ci si accorge, ci si lava. The verb stays third person singular.

proposed_attributes.common_miss: Dropping ci (si riposa) or pluralising the verb (ci si riposano).

rationale: I authored si_imp_cisi_01 and si_imp_cisi_02 for this pattern and bucketed them to impersonal.advanced so nothing strict-rejects, but ci si is a distinct, teachable sub-skill (the reflexive si surfacing as ci under the impersonal) that deserves its own history, separate from the adjective and compound-tense quirks that fill impersonal.advanced. External_id prefix si_imp_cisi_ makes the migration mechanical if you ratify.
